properties.entry: SELECT DISTINCT ON (FieldMapping.id) FieldMapping.id distinctId, FieldMapping.* FROM FieldMapping INNER JOIN DataSourceFieldMapping ON FieldMapping.id = DataSourceFieldMapping.fieldMappingId WHERE DataSourceFieldMapping.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND FieldMapping.context = :context AND FieldMapping.fieldName = :fieldName AND FieldMapping.ownerType = :ownerType

SELECT DISTINCT ON (FieldMapping.id) FieldMapping.id distinctId, FieldMapping.* FROM FieldMapping INNER JOIN DataSourceFieldMapping ON FieldMapping.id = DataSourceFieldMapping.fieldMappingId WHERE DataSourceFieldMapping.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND FieldMapping.context = :context AND FieldMapping.ownerType = :ownerType

SELECT FieldMapping.* FROM FieldMapping INNER JOIN DataSourceFieldMapping ON FieldMapping.id = DataSourceFieldMapping.fieldMappingId WHERE DataSourceFieldMapping.dataSourceId = :dataSourceId AND DataSourceFieldMapping.fieldName = :dataSourceFieldName AND FieldMapping.ownerType = :ownerType
